items.text: Come see "The Final Act"! A student theater show at Black Box Theatre, May 8-10, 7:30 PM. Tickets only $5 at the door. Proceeds fund next year's drama club. Don't miss this dramatic performance!

questions.stem: According to the flyer, where can tickets for the show be purchased?

options.B: At the Black Box Theatre box office
options.C: At the student center ticket counter
options.D: At the door of the theater

questions.explanation: The flyer states 'Tickets only $5 at the door.' Option D directly matches this. A, B, and C introduce locations not mentioned in the passage.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the purpose of the ticket sales?

options.A: To cover the costs of the current show
options.B: To support future drama club activities
options.C: To pay for the theater rental

questions.explanation: The flyer says 'Proceeds fund next year's drama club,' implying the money supports future activities. Option B is the correct inference. A, C, and D are not suggested by the text.
